message:
fix: Use [*]allowzero u8 for WASM memory access in _zerobuf module

WASM linear memory starts at address 0. The previous get_mem() returned
[*]u8 (non-null pointer) from @ptrFromInt(0), which LLVM treats as null
pointer UB in ReleaseFast. The optimizer eliminated ALL function bodies,
making every _zerobuf function return NULL.

Replace with [*]allowzero u8 via wasm_ptr() and direct wasm_load_*/
wasm_store_* helpers. This tells LLVM that address 0 is a valid base,
preventing dead code elimination of memory accesses.
